### CSS

<pre><code>{`/* Base styles */
.[component-class] {
  [property]: [value];
}

/* [Variant or modifier] */
.[component-class].[modifier] {
  [property]: [value];
}

/* Widescreen */
@media (min-width: 80rem) {
  .[component-class] {
    [property]: [value];
  }
}`}</code></pre>

### Design tokens reference

<pre><code>{`/* Typography */
--token/name    Mobile: Xrem / Xpx   →   Widescreen: Xrem / Xpx

/* Spacing */
--token/name    Mobile: Xrem / Xpx   →   Widescreen: Xrem / Xpx

/* Border-radius */
--token/name    Mobile: Xrem / Xpx   →   Widescreen: Xrem / Xpx
